name: Gundari
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>軍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>荼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>利</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>り</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card cannot be Special Summoned. This card returns to its owner's hand during the End Phase of the turn it is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up. If this card battles a Synchro Monster, return both monsters to their owners' hands at the start of the Damage Step (without damage calculation).
flavor: This card cannot be Special Summoned. This card returns to its owner's hand during the End Phase of the turn it is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up. If this card battles a Synchro Monster, return both monsters to their owners' hands at the start of the Damage Step (without damage calculation).

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
